---
title: "Untitled"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, styles.scss]
    self-contained: true
    chalkboard: false
    standalone: true
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    dev: png
    dev.args: { bg: "transparent" }
---

# Hello world

## Slide 2

[Quarto]{.blue} enables you to weave together [content]{.yellow} and [executable code]{.yellow} into a **finished presentation**. To learn more about [Quarto]{.blue} presentations see <https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/>.

## Fenced divs

::: blue
Some paragraph.
:::

or

::: {.yellow}
Some paragraph.
:::

## Links

https://slidecrafting-book.com/scss
